d: Navigate and block until load or timeout
Load HTML and block until load or timeout
Navigate with custom request, block until load or SynchronousTimeOut
Navigate to file under SetLocalContentRoot folder. Equivalent to Navigate("https://lv2.local/" + filename)
Map local folder to https://lv2.local/ virtual hostname
Map any hostname to local folder
Whether WebView has been created and is ready
Whether browser is in InPrivate mode
Call JS function with VBA arguments (Array, Recordset, or scalar). Auto-serializes to JSON.
Execute script with detailed result + exception info
Inject JS that runs on every page load
Post JSON message to JS. JS receives via window.chrome.webview.addEventListener('message', ...)
Push DAO/ADO Recordset as JSON array. Calls window[jsCallback](jsonArray) in JS. Native C++ serialization.
Convert any VBA data (string, number, array) to JSON string. Works without WebView2.
Fire a CustomEvent in the page. JS listens with addEventListener or window.lv.on()
Call JS function by dot-path with JSON args
Inject window.lv global JS facade. Call BEFORE first Navigate.
Get array item as JSON string
Get all keys from object at path
Convert JSON array to VBA 2D array
Check if element exists by selector
Print to PDF file (async, fires PrintToPdfCompleted)
Print to PDF using current print settings
Whether PrintToPdf is supported by runtime
Default OCX path for current Office app
Register VBA macro for JS messages
Clear data by kind flags (see LiteView2BrowsingDataKinds enum)
Remove automation indicators for browser compatibility
Set custom WebGL renderer strings for compatibility testing
Protect against cross-site canvas fingerprint tracking
Set custom screen dimensions for responsive testing
Prevent WebRTC IP address exposure for privacy
Natural mouse movement simulation for UI testing
Randomized timing for realistic interaction testing
Check if privacy mode is active
Configure CAPTCHA solving service for automated testing
Detect CAPTCHA presence on page (returns JSON)
Embed in external HWND (64-bit VBA only  -  use EmbedInHwndByLong for 32-bit)
Preview in same Frame as WebView2
Toggle HUD showing live JS/VBA message traffic
Timeout in ms for NavigateSync etc. (default 30000)
Create browser, returns index (1,2,3...) or 0 on failure
Hide browser (park)  -  preserves state for reuse
Destroy all parked browsers, returns count destroyed
Embed browser in VBA Frame control
Create + embed in one call, returns index
Move browser to new parent window
Clear browsing data by kind flags
Clear all browsing data for profile
Check if browser index is still valid
Count of active browsers in pool
Check if WebView2 runtime is installed
WebView2 engine initialized. Safe to call SetLocalContentRoot, Navigate, etc. Primary readiness signal.
Before navigation begins. Set Cancel = True to block.
After navigation completes. Fires AFTER window.onload.
JS called window.chrome.webview.postMessage(). NEVER call JsonGetValue here.
Popup window requested. Set Cancel = True to block.
Download about to begin. Cancel = True to block. Set resultFilePath to change save location.
Save As dialog about to show.
Server requests HTTP Basic Auth credentials.
Browser process crashed or exited unexpectedly.
Intercepted request (requires AddWebResourceRequestedFilter). Cancel = True to block.
Total match count updated during find.
iFrame navigating. Cancel = True to block.
Key pressed while control has focus.
Right-click context menu. args has LocationX, LocationY, PageUri, LinkUri, Handled properties.
Navigation to external scheme (mailto:, tel:, etc.).
CAPTCHA challenge detected on current page.
Bitfield flags for ClearBrowsingData. Combine with OR (e.g., LV2_DATA_COOKIES Or LV2_DATA_CACHE_STORAGE).
Specifies the reason for a focus change.
Controls how popup windows are handled.
Sets the preferred color scheme for web content.
Page orientation for printing and PDF export.
Tracking prevention level for the browser profile.
Corner alignment for the download dialog.
Bitfield flags for controlling PDF viewer toolbar visibility.
